notFound.title: You've wandered off.
notFound.note: This path doesn't exist, or it isn't built yet.

colophon.taglineEn: 以智驭财 · 行远致富

lede.pre: WiseFlow is an AI wealth companion that

colophon.intro: It doesn't chase daily prices or pile on headlines. Instead, it helps you refine vague market instincts into a handful of high-conviction investment commitments.

debt.label: Cognitive Debt

intro.pre: Today's AI competes to hand you answers faster. The more you crave that shortcut, the more you quietly run up a
intro.post: — every judgment outsourced is a chance your mind was meant to grow, but skipped.

para.pre: WiseFlow does the opposite. It never thinks for you; it hands the question back, again and again — every signal a chance for your mind to grow, every round of questioning a
para.post: , a work that is yours alone.

debt.pull:
Others use AI to replace thinking.
You use WiseFlow to practice it.

compound.label: Compounding Cognition

intro.pre: WiseFlow isn't a tool to make you “earn more.” It's a

compound.introSub: Every complete cycle — capture, questioning, committee, signing, retrospective — is principal. Time compounds it for you, interest upon interest.

observe.text: Observe — every signal you write down trains your attention.

reason.text: Reason — every five rounds of questioning train structured thinking.

discipline.text: Discipline — every committee review recalibrates your circle of competence.

commit.text: Commit — every commitment you sign trains pre-decision.

reflect.text: Reflect — every retrospective trains you to see yourself clearly.

compound.close:
Wealth compounds from capital.
Cognition compounds from repetition.
compound.closeBody: A year on, you haven't just earned money — you've built a system of judgment that won't be swept along by market sentiment. It keeps compounding through your next investment, your next decade.
